title: Update Habibur Rahman Babul's photo with uploaded real portrait

requirements.text: Replace the current photo of team member Habibur Rahman Babul in the team section (used in AboutPage.tsx and HomePage.tsx) with the newly uploaded real portrait image (3-8.jpeg). Save it as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/habibur-rahman-babul.png and update all references to this team member's photo accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded portrait of Habibur Rahman Babul (white shirt, white background, face fully visible and centered) is displayed in the team section on both the About page and Home page.
The image file is saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/habibur-rahman-babul.png.
No other team member's photo is affected.
The image renders correctly at all viewport sizes without cropping the head.

constraints: Do not modify any immutable frontend paths such as hooks or UI components.
Do not alter any other team member's photo or data.
Use the uploaded image (3-8.jpeg) as the direct source for Habibur Rahman Babul's portrait — do not generate or replace it with an AI-generated image.
nonGoals: Changing any other content, layout, or styling on the About or Home pages.
Updating backend data models or student records.
Regenerating or editing any other team member photos.

edits: Crop and optimize the uploaded portrait of a middle-aged South Asian man with grey mustache in a white shirt against a white background, face fully centered with full head visible (3-8.jpeg > habibur-rahman-babul.dim_400x500.png)
